All work

Projects

Practical security work — network analysis, offensive techniques, and tooling. Every project is documented for reproducibility.

in progress 2025-01

Vulnerability Assessment Framework

A modular, automated framework for conducting structured vulnerability assessments on small network environments — built as a senior capstone project.

BashPythonNmapOpenVASMetasploit
Outcome

In progress — target completion June 2025.
forensics 2024-03

Network Traffic Anomaly Detector

A machine-learning pipeline that identifies anomalous network traffic patterns by analyzing pcap files and flagging deviations from learned baselines.

PythonScikit-learnWiresharkPandasMatplotlib
Outcome

Achieved 94% detection accuracy on the CICIDS2017 dataset with <2% false positive rate.
offensive 2024-01

CTF Write-up Collection

A curated collection of write-ups from competitive Capture the Flag competitions, documenting methodology, tools, and thought process for each challenge solved.

BashPythonGDBBurp Suitepwntools
Outcome

Top 15% finish at NahamCon CTF 2024. Documented 20+ challenge solutions across web, pwn, and forensics categories.
red team 2023-10

Password Audit & Cracking Lab

A controlled lab environment for testing password policy strength using Hashcat and John the Ripper against intentionally weak credential databases.

HashcatJohn the RipperPythonKali Linux
Outcome

Cracked 78% of MD5-hashed passwords in under 2 hours using hybrid attack mode. Documented policy recommendations.
